sentences.target: Ich brauche eine Salbe für meine Hände.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈzalbə fyːɐ̯ ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈhɛndə/

translations.de: Ich brauche eine Salbe für meine Hände.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈzalbə fyːɐ̯ ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈhɛndə/
translations.en: I need an ointment for my hands.
translations.es: Necesito una pomada para las manos.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’une pommade pour les mains.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di una pomata per le mani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要一支给手用的药膏。
translations.yue: 我需要一支搽手的藥膏。
translations.pt: Preciso de uma pomada para as mãos.
translations.vi: Tôi cần thuốc mỡ bôi tay.
translations.nl: Ik heb een zalf nodig voor mijn handen.
translations.hu: Szükségem van egy kenőcsre a kezemre.
translations.hi: मुझे हाथों के लिए एक मरहम चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι μια αλοιφή για τα χέρια μου.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger en salve til hendene mine.
translations.id: Saya butuh salep untuk tangan saya.
translations.sv: Jag behöver en salva till händerna.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de o alifie pentru mâini.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for en salve til hænderne.
translations.ja: 手に塗る軟膏が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a direct object (Akk.) and a PP with 'für'.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; agrees with 'Salbe' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP indicating the affected body part/beneficiary.
Possessive determiner, plural accusative; modifies 'Hände' and agrees in number/case.
Common noun, plural, accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Du trägst die Salbe bitte auf die Wunde.
sentences.reading: /duː tʁɛːkst diː ˈzalbə ˈbɪtə aʊ̯f diː ˈvʊndə/

translations.de: Du trägst die Salbe bitte auf die Wunde.
translations.ipa: /duː tʁɛːkst diː ˈzalbə ˈbɪtə aʊ̯f diː ˈvʊndə/
translations.en: Please apply the ointment to the wound.
translations.es: Por favor, aplica la pomada en la herida.
translations.fr: S’il te plaît, applique la pommade sur la plaie.
translations.it: Per favore, applica la pomata sulla ferita.
translations.yue: 麻煩你把藥膏搽喺傷口上。
translations.pt: Por favor, passe a pomada na ferida.
translations.he: בבקשה מרח את המשחה על הפצע.
translations.vi: Làm ơn bôi thuốc mỡ lên vết thương.
translations.ar: من فضلك ضع المرهم على الجرح.
translations.nl: Smeer alsjeblieft de zalf op de wond.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, нанеси мазь на рану.
translations.hu: Kérlek, kend be a sebet a kenőccsel.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, βάλε την αλοιφή στο τραύμα.
translations.sv: Snälla, smörj in såret med salvan.
translations.ro: Te rog, aplică alifia pe rană.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja levitä voidetta haavaan.
translations.ja: 傷口に軟膏を塗ってください。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object ('die Salbe') and a directional PP with 'auf + Akk.'
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Salbe' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'trägst'.
Politeness marker used adverbially; modifies the clause, no inflection.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a directional PP indicating the target surface.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Wunde' as object of the preposition.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Die Salbe hilft mir gegen den Ausschlag.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈzalbə hɪlft miːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡən deːn ˈaʊ̯ʃlaːk/

translations.de: Die Salbe hilft mir gegen den Ausschlag.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈzalbə hɪlft miːɐ̯ ˈɡeːɡən deːn ˈaʊ̯ʃlaːk/
translations.en: The ointment helps with my rash.
translations.es: La pomada me ayuda con el sarpullido.
translations.fr: La pommade m’aide contre mon éruption cutanée.
translations.it: La pomata mi aiuta con lo sfogo.
translations.zh-Hans: 这药膏对我的皮疹有帮助。
translations.yue: 呢支藥膏對我嘅皮疹有幫助。
translations.pt: A pomada ajuda com a minha irritação na pele.
translations.vi: Thuốc mỡ giúp tôi giảm phát ban.
translations.ar: المرهم يساعد في تخفيف الطفح الجلدي لدي.
translations.nl: De zalf helpt tegen mijn uitslag.
translations.hu: A kenőcs segít a kiütésem ellen.
translations.hi: मरहम से मेरे चकत्ते में राहत मिलती है.
translations.el: Η αλοιφή βοηθάει στο εξάνθημά μου.
translations.ja: この軟膏は湿疹に効きます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determines the subject 'Salbe'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of 'hilft'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects a dative ('mir') and can take a 'gegen + Akk.' PP.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/experiencer with 'helfen'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces what the help is directed against.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determines 'Ausschlag' as object of 'gegen'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'gegen'.

sentences.target: Wir haben keine Salbe mehr zu Hause.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈzalbə meːɐ̯ tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/

translations.de: Wir haben keine Salbe mehr zu Hause.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈzalbə meːɐ̯ tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/
translations.en: We don't have any ointment at home anymore.
translations.es: Ya no tenemos pomada en casa.
translations.fr: On n’a plus de pommade à la maison.
translations.it: Non abbiamo più pomata in casa.
translations.ru: У нас дома больше нет мази.
translations.pt: Não temos mais pomada em casa.
translations.vi: Ở nhà giờ không còn thuốc mỡ nữa.
translations.ar: لم يعد لدينا مرهم في البيت.
translations.nl: We hebben geen zalf meer in huis.
translations.uk: У нас вдома більше немає мазі.
translations.hi: अब घर में मरहम नहीं है.
translations.pl: Nie mamy już maści v domu.
translations.el: Δεν έχουμε πια αλοιφή στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: Vi har ikke mer salve hjemme.
translations.id: Di rumah sudah tidak ada salep lagi.
translations.sv: Vi har inte längre någon salva hemma.
translations.da: Vi har ikke mere salve derhjemme.
translations.fi: Meillä ei ole enää voidetta kotona.
translations.ja: もう家に軟膏がありません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes a direct object.
Negative determiner, feminine accusative singular; negates the noun phrase 'Salbe'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'haben'.
Adverb indicating continuation up to now; with negation ('kein ... mehr') expresses 'no longer/anymore'.
Preposition governing dative; part of the fixed locative expression 'zu Hause' meaning 'at home'.
Common noun, neuter, dative singular; lexicalized dative form in the fixed expression 'zu Hause' functioning adverbially.

es: Necesito una pomada para las manos.
Por favor, aplica la pomada en la herida.
La pomada me ayuda con el sarpullido.
Ya no tenemos pomada en casa.
fr: J’ai besoin d’une pommade pour les mains.
S’il te plaît, applique la pommade sur la plaie.
La pommade m’aide contre mon éruption cutanée.
On n’a plus de pommade à la maison.
it: Ho bisogno di una pomata per le mani.
Per favore, applica la pomata sulla ferita.
La pomata mi aiuta con lo sfogo.
Non abbiamo più pomata in casa.
zh-Hans: 我需要一支给手用的药膏。
这药膏对我的皮疹有帮助。
yue: 我需要一支搽手的藥膏。
麻煩你把藥膏搽喺傷口上。
呢支藥膏對我嘅皮疹有幫助。

pt: Preciso de uma pomada para as mãos.
Por favor, passe a pomada na ferida.
A pomada ajuda com a minha irritação na pele.
Não temos mais pomada em casa.
he: בבקשה מרח את המשחה על הפצע.

Làm ơn bôi thuốc mỡ lên vết thương.
Thuốc mỡ giúp tôi giảm phát ban.
Ở nhà giờ không còn thuốc mỡ nữa.

المرهم يساعد في تخفيف الطفح الجلدي لدي.
لم يعد لدينا مرهم في البيت.
nl: Ik heb een zalf nodig voor mijn handen.
Smeer alsjeblieft de zalf op de wond.
De zalf helpt tegen mijn uitslag.
We hebben geen zalf meer in huis.
uk: Будь ласка, нанеси мазь на рану.
У нас вдома більше немає мазі.
hu: Szükségem van egy kenőcsre a kezemre.
Kérlek, kend be a sebet a kenőccsel.
A kenőcs segít a kiütésem ellen.
hi: मुझे हाथों के लिए एक मरहम चाहिए.
मरहम से मेरे चकत्ते में राहत मिलती है.
अब घर में मरहम नहीं है.
pl: Nie mamy już maści v domu.

Σε παρακαλώ, βάλε την αλοιφή στο τραύμα.
Η αλοιφή βοηθάει στο εξάνθημά μου.
Δεν έχουμε πια αλοιφή στο σπίτι.
nb: Jeg trenger en salve til hendene mine.
Vi har ikke mer salve hjemme.
id: Saya butuh salep untuk tangan saya.
Di rumah sudah tidak ada salep lagi.
sv: Jag behöver en salva till händerna.
Snälla, smörj in såret med salvan.
Vi har inte längre någon salva hemma.
ro: Am nevoie de o alifie pentru mâini.
Te rog, aplică alifia pe rană.
da: Jeg har brug for en salve til hænderne.
Vi har ikke mere salve derhjemme.
fi: Ole hyvä ja levitä voidetta haavaan.
Meillä ei ole enää voidetta kotona.
